description: CompositionGrey hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has drawstrings for the hood, long sleeves with a ribbed cuff, two pockets on the front, graphic print and a ribbed hemFitRegular  Wash care Dry clean onlyCool iron if needed and iron print on reverseThis sweatshirt from s.oliver is a refreshing addition to your winter wardrobe. The thick fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth, while the stylish print on the chest flaunts a sporty attitude. Layer this sweatshirt over long t-shirts and jeans or trackpants, and slip into sports shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
